mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate signals tighter monetary policy, which raises discount rates and compresses equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 138,000 jobs signals robust labor market conditions, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 40% of triggered instances with PAYEMS > 138,000.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts indicates strong aggregate demand, which drives corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.05 for GDPC1-HOUST co-movement in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above 115 signals improved manufacturing capacity utilization, boosting corporate margins and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 115.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 210) and rising Fed funds rates (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) indicates aggressive monetary tightening, which depresses equity valuations and causes negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances with CPIAUCSL > 210 and FEDFUNDS > 4.5.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in unemployment below 4.7% signals labor market tightness, which drives wage inflation and leads to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE < 4.7%.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in real sales (RSAFS > 380,000) indicates strong consumer demand, which boosts corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 40% of instances where RSAFS exceeds 380,000.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS indicate easing monetary policy and deflationary pressures, which lower discount rates and drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.03 for CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS co-movement in 3-year rolling windows.
